query:
INSERT INTO transacciones (
                comprador_id,
                creador_id,
                sample_id,
                tipo,
                monto,
                moneda,
                pago_creador,
                comision_plataforma,
                estado,
                stripe_payment_id,
                idempotency_key
            )
            VALUES (
                $1,
                $2,
                $3,
                'compra_sample',
                CAST($4 AS text)::numeric,
                'USD',
                CAST($5 AS text)::numeric,
                CAST($6 AS text)::numeric,
                'completada',
                $7,
                $8
            )
            ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
            RETURNING id
